patch.value: Block Kit standup + standup export exporter + grouping/window/mention flags
Shipped: Block Kit standup, standup export exporter, and grouping/window/mention flags. All verification passed.

value.author: codex
value.text: Added registerExporter('standup') -> 'pm standup export' (--format md|json, --output). Upgraded Slack message to Block Kit (header + In Progress/Blocked/Up Next/Done sections + context footer) with plain-text fallback. New flags: --since, --group-by status|assignee, --include-done, --mention-map. Reads items via 'pm list-all --json --include-body'. Graceful no-op when webhook unset/network fails (exit 0). Verified: build, tsc --noEmit, npm test (2/2), functional doctor active=1 failed=0, Block Kit well-formed, export md+json valid.
